title: Kana Kaanum Kangal Lyrics Agni Sakshi
stanzas:
<div>
Kana Kaanum Kangal Lyrics Agni Sakshi

Kanaa kaanum kangal mella
urangaatho paadal solla
nilaa kaala megam ellaam
ulaa pogum neram kanne

Kanaa kaanum kangal mella
urangaatho paadal solla
nilaa kaala megam ellaam
ulaa pogum neram kanne
ulaa pogum neram kanne

kumari uruvam
kuzhanthai ullam
rendum ondraana
maayam neeyo.
thalaivan madiyil
magalin vadivil
thoongum seiyo. (2)

nodiyil naalthorum
niram maarum devi
vidaithaan kidaikkaamal
thadumaarum kelvi.
vilakku yaetri vaithaal kooda
nizhal pola thondrum nijame
nizhal pola thondrum nijame

naan un nijathai
nesikkiren
un nizhalaiyo poojikkiren
athanaalthaan
un nizhal vizhuntha nilathin
mannai kooda
en netriyil neerupol
thiruneerupol ittukolgiren

Kanaa kaanum kangal mella
urangaatho paadal solla

pudhiya kavithai
punaiyum kuyile
nenjil undaana
kaayam enna.
ninaivu alaigal
neruppil kulikkum
paavam enna.

kizhakku velukkaamal
irukkaathu vaanam.
vidiyum naal paarthu
iruppene naanum.

varungaalum inbam endru
nigazhkaalam koorum kanne.
nigazhkaalam koorum kanne.

Kanaa kaanum kangal mella
urangaatho paadal solla
nilaa kaala megam ellaam
ulaa pogum neram kanne

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kana Kaanum Kangal?

The song is a romantic melody that evokes feelings of love and nostalgia.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is beautifully sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and Saritha.

Who composed the music for Agni Sakshi?

The music was composed by the legendary M. S. Viswanathan.

When was the song Kana Kaanum Kangal released?

The song was released on November 14, 1982.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kana Kaanum Kangal from the movie Agni Sakshi is a beautiful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the iconic duo S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and Saritha, the melody is soothing and timeless. The lyrics convey a sense of dreamy romance, making it perfect for moments of reflection and nostalgia. M. S. Viswanathan's composition enhances the emotional depth, creating a classic that resonates with listeners even today.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kana Kaanum Kangal from the classic film Agni Sakshi. This enchanting melody, brought to life by the legendary voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and Saritha, is a testament to the musical genius of M. S. Viswanathan. Let the soothing tunes and romantic lyrics transport you to a world of nostalgia and love.
stanzaMeanings: The eyes that dream don't sleep easily, as the moon sings a song. When the clouds roam around, dear.
The eyes that dream don't sleep easily, as the moon sings a song. When the clouds roam around, dear, when the clouds roam around, dear.
The form of a young girl and the heart of a child, both are a magic that is you. Resting in the lap of the leader, you sleep in the form of a woman.
In a moment, the colors change every day. The goddess's gift is not found, and questions remain. Even if a lamp is lit, the truth appears like a shadow, the truth appears like a shadow.
I love your truth, but I worship your shadow. That's why I even take the soil where your shadow falls and apply it on my forehead like sacred ash.
The eyes that dream don't sleep easily, as the moon sings a song.
Oh cuckoo that writes new poetry, what is the pain in your heart? What is the sin of memories bathing in fire?
The sky will not stay without the east lighting up. I too wait for the dawn to come.
The present says that the future will be happy, dear. The present says so, dear.
The eyes that dream don't sleep easily, as the moon sings a song. When the clouds roam around, dear.
